item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
pros

  • Fucking stellar work on the diary entries. I would have said they dragged on a bit but I know that if you made them shorter, I would have bitched that the dude went crazy too fast. The language is great, the ebbs and flows in his craziness, the slide and uptick.
  • Interview log was also great - dialogue didn't feel stiff at all, very genuine, good short-term characterization of Metcalfe.
  • Description stuff was certainly engaging - a bit excessively clinical in bits bit overall super interesting, lots of implications.
  • I liked the mural log but I also have a crippling weakness to the trope of "here are a bunch of ancient murals, you figure out what's going on". It's pretty niche but I fall for it like every time lol

cons

  • Not totally sold on the audio log before the ~~AT Field~~ EVE explosion. It just seems to reiterate a lot of the points already made through subtext in the diary. I'll think about it, but I'm not really sure.
  • I don't understand the ending. It must be relevant in the context of the larger series, because as it is It just feels to me like a way to quickly close up Metcalfe's arc and introduce "oh shit he was right croc back" except we already knew that.

overall
The diaries carried this for me. They're just super fucking fun, an awesome ride into a collapsing mind and it keeps you hooked right until the end because of how it ebbs and flows. Between that and the interview, I'm happy to upvote this even if I have reservations about the ending and audio, the rest of it more than makes up for that. Great stuff.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I genuinely forget who looked over this besides my team and PlaguePJP.
